evidence.description: Qasem Soleimani, as commander of the IRGC Quds Force, was a key Iranian interlocutor with Iraqi political figures including al-Maliki. Soleimani played a direct role in brokering Iraq's government formation in 2010, helping al-Maliki retain the premiership.

editorial_notes: Soleimani's role in Iraqi politics during al-Maliki's tenure is well-documented; he helped broker the 2010 government formation that kept al-Maliki in power.
